description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: unit-test, run-coverage, and upload-coverage. The unit-test job runs on a matrix of Python versions and operating systems, installing dependencies and running tests with tox. The run-coverage job runs on a matrix of Python 3.10 and operating systems, installing dependencies, running tests with tox, and uploading coverage artifacts. The upload-coverage job depends on run-coverage, downloads coverage artifacts, combines coverage reports, and uploads the combined report to Coveralls.
